checkin.context_label: Home office with two afternoon calls
checkin.constraints_text: Client call at 15:00, grocery errand after 18:00
checkin.required_tasks_text:
Ship onboarding flow draft | 120 | deep

reflection.wins_text: Protected the proposal and shipped one usable draft.
reflection.friction_text: Started too big while tired and paid a switching cost.
reflection.gratitude_text: Short walk after lunch helped me reset.
reflection.tomorrow_adjustment: Start with a 25-minute block before opening inboxes.
